tasks.label: restart-backend-for-contract-repair
tasks.command: cd "/Users/ambermooney/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/TAAIP" && (lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true) && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn services.api.app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 > logs/backend.log 2>&1 & echo restarted

tasks.command: cd "/Users/ambermooney/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/TAAIP" && (lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true) && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn services.api.app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 > logs/backend.log 2>&1 & echo restarted
